purpose: Provide a degraded-mode readiness and stale-in-progress report from .beads/issues.jsonl without touching SQLite, br, or bv when tracker DB paths are locked or slow. Stale in-progress detection is based on latest visible issue activity, including issue comments, so recent work evidence is not misclassified as dead.
validation_commands: bash scripts/check_tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.sh --validate-only | jq -e '(.safe_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.permissioned_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.permissioned_ready_summary | type == "array") and (.cross_project_review_ids | type == "array") and (.blocked_open_ids | type == "array") and (.blocker_explanations | type == "array") and (.blocked_by_counts | type == "array") and (.top_blocker_ids | type == "array") and (.in_progress_ids | type == "array") and (.in_progress_age_summary | type == "array") and (.recommended_next_action.decision | type == "string")'

jq -e '(.stdout_summary.safe_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.permissioned_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.permissioned_ready_summary | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.cross_project_review_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocked_open_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocker_explanations | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocked_by_counts | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.top_blocker_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.in_progress_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.in_progress_age_summary | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.recommended_next_action.decision | type == "string")' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json

jq -e '(.dependency_cycles | type == "array") and (.summary.dependency_cycle_total | type == "number") and (.stdout_summary.dependency_cycle_count | type == "number") and (.stdout_summary.dependency_cycles | type == "array")' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json

jq -e 'all(.stdout_summary.permissioned_ready_summary[]; .approval_request.exact_user_approval_required == true and .approval_request.safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .approval_request.execution_not_started == true and (.approval_request.explicit_user_approval_text | type == "string") and (.approval_request.required_env | type == "object") and (.approval_request.capability_prerequisites | type == "array") and (.approval_request.next_action | type == "string"))' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json

jq -e 'all(.permissioned_ready[]; .approval_request.exact_user_approval_required == true and .approval_request.safe_to_run_without_user_approval == false and .approval_request.execution_not_started == true and (.approval_request.explicit_user_approval_text | type == "string") and (.approval_request.required_env | type == "object") and (.approval_request.capability_prerequisites | type == "array") and (.approval_request.next_action | type == "string"))' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json

jq -e 'all(.cross_project_review[]; (.cross_project_markers | type == "array") and (.artifact_references | type == "array") and (.artifact_reference_status == "present" or .artifact_reference_status == "missing") and .review_reason == "cross_project_or_external_workload_marker")' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json
